title: Master of Men
writer: Chester Erskine, Eugene Solow, Seton I. Miller
actors: Jack Holt, Fay Wray, Walter Connolly
plot: A steel-mill worker, Buck Garrett (Jack Holt) betters himself and becomes involved in the New York stock market. He marries Kay Walling (Fay Wray), who disapproves his market schemes and gabs about them to the wrong people. The re...
